creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 193887
2.2.2 with upstream libressl support

It's way past my bedtime, but here's a patch to the ports tree incorporating upstream's changes to support libressl. This is a simple diff between their master branch and version 2.2.2 on just the relevant src/_cffi_src/openssl directory. The delta between version 2.1.4 and upstream's libressl support was too great, actually refusing to build.

Passes testport, but needs functional testing, as this is an unofficial backport.
